{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151737C27A7B8BF73F31761ED7"}"},"total":99},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607378554579157785","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从多年文娱读者角度来看，能看出文笔仍显稚嫩，节奏把控也亟待加强，但是最基本的爽感、慢节奏爽文里的生活化部分的安排等，已经基本具备。不说一定是一本大火的好书，但是在文娱类网文千篇一律的现在算得上一本可读之作。能看得到创新，也没有因为创新舍弃吸引人的爽点。我能感觉出一些对经典文娱网文的借鉴，但是不算反感，只能说希望作者在此之上有新的思路新的纲领。看书以来很少写评，更少直接翻开这么一本幼苗小书直接看完。文娱文抄公这类小说对我来说有特别的意义，以上姑且作为念想。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771234047,"group_id":"7579651528596655129","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"以希望拨动死亡之弦，弹奏吟唱生命的歌","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyIGivHwJQ85E0W40XRSPw8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"698942277553309","user_name":"醉墨染琉璃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"698942277553309","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579651528596655129","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文+无cp+群像+文娱系统+轻松日常+萌娃】

陆云隽穿越了，从豪门小透明变成了蓝星父母双亡的十五岁少年，还附赠一个两岁半的妹妹，舟舟。
面对从天而降的“文娱全能系统”，陆云隽陷入沉思。
当巨星？先等等。
他觉得当务之急是挣钱、买房、给妹妹挑个靠谱的幼儿园！

于是，别人穿越争霸天下，他穿越专心带娃。
写写《斗罗》，发发《彩云之南》，拍点萌娃日常火遍全网，顺手拿个童话大赛金奖当零花钱，然后火速带娃搬进学区房大平层。
他梦想中的高中生活：上学、接娃、陪玩，岁月静好。
现实却把他扔进了S班——这里聚集了全九州最天才、最高傲、日常用鼻孔看人的“怪物”同学们。

音乐世家的高傲少女？被他随手弹的《钟》震得怀疑人生。
文学传家的翩翩公子？被他信手拈来的《秋夕》整不会了。
还有计算机天才、武道传人、艺术世家……
现在，这群天才们最大的烦恼是：卷不过陆哥怎么办？在线等，挺急的。

当全蓝星都以为，这个全能怪物终将征服所有领域，登上神坛。
只有陆云隽自己知道——
他点亮所有技能，只为给妹妹舟舟建造一个童话般的无忧世界。

——这是一段关于守护与成长，在温馨日常中悄然掀起一场文明波澜的传奇，主线养娃","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ef23ecc77443ca9422e083783bce077a","author":"烛幽沌羲","author_id":"","book_id":"7579651528596655129","book_name":"我在蓝星当哥，结果技能满级了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#3068c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7587025251540681241","read_count":"17640","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"595302"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"116","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,系统,天才,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5bd20b919d3451bcfa498b6a07d0a92d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434257&x-signature=8D%2FxMyVCJqRAhNudadAGECor3ic%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"228290150796557","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"72"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151737C27A7B8BF73F31761ED7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count": 也有朋友之间的友情 每个人的形象都很灵动 有生气"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771236183,"group_id":"7579651528596655129","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwrU/zpCJXd7Ckz7KBiJsdoEaYugfWBydJkMu6pzTiWs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/461a5b061ddc47d3a128429849c7454f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788841&x-signature=zoXAAt%2Bv9f%2Bnw%2F0ha0kURbRFXrE%3D","user_id":"3546376027245111","user_name":"凌晨海风时"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3546376027245111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579651528596655129","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文+无cp+群像+文娱系统+轻松日常+萌娃】

陆云隽穿越了，从豪门小透明变成了蓝星父母双亡的十五岁少年，还附赠一个两岁半的妹妹，舟舟。
面对从天而降的“文娱全能系统”，陆云隽陷入沉思。
当巨星？先等等。
他觉得当务之急是挣钱、买房、给妹妹挑个靠谱的幼儿园！

于是，别人穿越争霸天下，他穿越专心带娃。
写写《斗罗》，发发《彩云之南》，拍点萌娃日常火遍全网，顺手拿个童话大赛金奖当零花钱，然后火速带娃搬进学区房大平层。
他梦想中的高中生活：上学、接娃、陪玩，岁月静好。
现实却把他扔进了S班——这里聚集了全九州最天才、最高傲、日常用鼻孔看人的“怪物”同学们。

音乐世家的高傲少女？被他随手弹的《钟》震得怀疑人生。
文学传家的翩翩公子？被他信手拈来的《秋夕》整不会了。
还有计算机天才、武道传人、艺术世家……
现在，这群天才们最大的烦恼是：卷不过陆哥怎么办？在线等，挺急的。

当全蓝星都以为，这个全能怪物终将征服所有领域，登上神坛。
只有陆云隽自己知道——
他点亮所有技能，只为给妹妹舟舟建造一个童话般的无忧世界。
